title: CreditFactors
description: The Credit Monitor read-model this module OWNS and PROVIDES: the user's Canadian credit score, score band, and the ranked top factors driving it, each with a bilingual explanation and a FreshnessStamp (FR-CRD-001). This is DISTINCT from the spine's finos:spine/CreditState/1.0.0 — the spine remains the SINGLE canonical provider of utilization, bands, and due-date risk (FR-CORE-005); this contract carries the bureau-sourced SCORE and FACTOR narrative that Module 2 derives and surfaces, never a competing utilization figure. Score is a bureau MONEY-adjacent guardrail value: when the underlying bureau feed is STALE the score is flagged stale and dependent coaching withholds per Fresh-or-Flagged (Constitution VIII). Consumers: Credit UI, Household. Recommend-only — no money movement.

profile_id.description: Owning profile. AuthZ enforced server-side against the validated session identity — never a client-supplied profile_id (threat model IDOR; household visibility gated by MemberScope per FR-HH-001).

household_id.description: Household this profile belongs to, if any. Another member's CreditFactors is never exposed outside the owner's granted MemberScope.

score.description: Canadian bureau credit score (Equifax/TransUnion range 300–900). null when no bureau feed is connected — consumers render the Empty/Connect state, never a zero-filled score.

score_band.description: Coarse band derived from score for display; null when score is null.

score_source.description: Bureau/source identifier (e.g. 'equifax_canada', 'transunion_canada'); null when absent. Never a raw token or secret.

score_delta_since_last.description: Signed change in score versus the previous observation (e.g. +12, -5); null on first observation or when score is null. Informational only.

top_factors.description: Ranked factors driving the score (most impactful first). Each carries a bilingual explanation so the Credit Monitor is explainable (Constitution VI). May be empty when no bureau report is available.

factor_code.description: Normalized factor category. 'utilization' here is the NARRATIVE factor; the authoritative utilization figure/band always comes from finos:spine/CreditState/1.0.0, not from this contract.

impact.description: Direction of this factor's effect on the score.

weight_rank.description: 1 = most impactful factor; null when the bureau does not rank.

label_fr.description: Human-readable factor explanation, French (fr-CA). A missing fr label is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

freshness.description: Freshness of the bureau-sourced score/factors. Stale ⇒ score and dependent coaching are flagged/withheld; a stale score is never shown as current (FR-CRD-001/004, Constitution VIII).
